query:
INSERT INTO island_guides (name, slug, contentType, atoll, overview, published, featured, displayOrder)
VALUES 
  ('Dharavandhoo', 'dharavandhoo', 'island', 'Baa Atoll', 'Offering an ultimate Maldives experience on budget prices, Dharavandhoo is a populated island of Baa Atoll with world-class diving sites where the clean waters of Hanifaru Bay and Dharavandhoo Thila are home to incredible marine life.', 1, 1, 0),
  ('Fulhadhoo', 'fulhadhoo', 'island', 'Baa Atoll', 'Fulhadhoo is one of the inhabited islands of Baa atoll in the Maldives. If a serene and quiet vacation is what you need - clean white sands without crowds, turquoise water, beautiful marine life and healthy coral reefs - Fulhadhoo is the perfect choice.', 1, 1, 1),
  ('Maalhos', 'maalhos', 'island', 'Baa Atoll', 'Maalhos is one of the inhabited islands of Baa Atoll in the Maldives. Home to Madi Finolhu Guest House, Maalhos is located in the only UNESCO Biosphere Reserve and it''s just a couple of minutes away from Hanifaru Bay.', 1, 0, 0),
  ('Kamadhoo', 'kamadhoo', 'island', 'Baa Atoll', 'A home to Kamadhoo Inn, Kamadhoo is a charming local island in Baa Atoll, Maldives. With white, sandy beaches, turquoise lagoons, and excellent diving opportunities, it offers an authentic island experience.', 1, 0, 0),
  ('Fehendhoo', 'fehendhoo', 'island', 'Baa Atoll', 'Fehendhoo is a populated island located between the islands of Goidhoo and Fulhadhoo in the Maldives. If you love snorkeling and diving, beach life, sea fishing and water sports away from crowds, Fehendhoo is your perfect destination.', 1, 0, 0),
  ('Goidhoo', 'goidhoo', 'island', 'Baa Atoll', 'Goidhoo is a charming local island in Baa Atoll known for its pristine beaches and excellent diving sites. Home to several guesthouses, it offers an authentic Maldivian island experience with world-class water sports.', 1, 0, 0),
  ('Godhdhoo', 'godhdhoo', 'island', 'Baa Atoll', 'Peaceful local island with access to Hanifaru Bay and excellent diving opportunities', 1, 0, 0);
